notes: Pre-built TeaVM JS from PlantUML GitHub Releases snapshot tag. No JDK needed. plantuml.js is the ES module (import { render }), viz-global.js must be loaded as a <script> before importing plantuml.js. API: render(lines, targetId, {dark}) — async, writes SVG into the target DOM element.
